cards.subtitle: Light variant on each tier tint + dark variant; single-row motif punctuation

cards.subtitle: One open at a time, grid-rows motion (360ms ease-out), closed panels crawlable, Escape closes

cards.subtitle: Locked contract: visible field names, services[] values, data-meta hidden set, honeypot. States: rest / focus / error / help / consent + success & error panels
cards.name: intake form

cards.subtitle: Two-tier link rule (2A ruling 5): standalone half-rule grows to full accent; prose links whisper hairline → accent. Hover them.

cards.subtitle: Serif values, hairline dividers — claims stay baseline-sourced

cards.subtitle: Hover micro-states + scroll entrance + view transitions — the page-level motion spec, all within 120–360ms / ≤8px

cards.subtitle: #13 — breadcrumb, schema-backed on every page. Real-element separators, current page in ink.
